question: Total completed-order revenue by customer country, highest first.

attempts.raw_response: {"sql": "SELECT c.country, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS revenue FROM customers AS c JOIN orders AS o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN order_items AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY c.country ORDER BY revenue DESC, c.country", "assumptions": ["gold replay"], "selected_tables": []}

candidate.sql: SELECT c.country, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS revenue FROM customers AS c JOIN orders AS o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN order_items AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY c.country ORDER BY revenue DESC, c.country

policy.normalized_sql: SELECT c.country, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS revenue FROM customers AS c JOIN orders AS o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN order_items AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY c.country ORDER BY revenue DESC, c.country LIMIT 200
